Appearance

PrismAI-Driven Development Workflow Suite

Research → Plan → Implement → Validate. Autonomous AI development across CLI, VS Code, and Electron.

Get Started
CLI Dashboard
VS Code Extension
🔬

Claude Plugin Architecture

Pure markdown-based prompt engineering. 25 commands, 10 agents, 11 skills — zero build step. Extends Claude Code with the 4-phase workflow methodology.

Explore Plugin →

🖥️

CLI Dashboard (Go/Bubble Tea)

Full-screen TUI with 11 interactive screens, 3D prism renderer, spring animations, real-time Spectrum execution monitoring, and multi-workspace management.

Explore CLI →

🧩

VS Code Extension

IDE-integrated chat, visual office game, monitor panel, and workspaces. Shares all business logic with the Electron app via npm monorepo.

Explore VS Code →

⚡

Electron Desktop App

Standalone desktop app with IDE-independent operation, native menus, tray icon, and full feature parity with the VS Code extension.

Explore Electron →

🔄

Spectrum Autonomous Execution

Fresh Claude sessions per story, no context degradation. State persists through stories.json and .prism/shared/ files across sessions.

Learn Spectrum →

📦

Monorepo Architecture

packages/prism-core and packages/prism-ui shared packages. npm workspaces. TypeScript path aliases. Zero code duplication between platforms.

Explore Monorepo →

Prism — AI-Driven Development Workflow Suite

v3.7.7
